creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Ack!  Old PR, especially in GNOME terms.  With an up-to-date STABLE, can 
you reproduce the problem?  If so, please report back here, otherwise it 
will be closed in 2 weeks owing to the fact that the port has built 
successfully for some time. 

Apologies for the length of time this PR has remained in limbo.
